narrative_audit:
# EU AI Act Article 14 Compliance Audit Report
## Human Oversight Verification — Structured Audit Report

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

**Audit Reference:** CAA-2024-ART14-001  
**Audit Type:** Article 14 Human Oversight Verification  
**System Classification:** High-Risk AI System (Medical Diagnostic Support)  
**Audit Status:** COMPLETED  
**Overall Compliance:** ⚠️ CONDITIONAL PASS — See detailed findings below

---

### 1.3 PROV Graph Relationships (wasInformedBy / wasDerivedFrom)

```
PROV-004 (AI Recommendation) 
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-003 (Model Inference)
    └─ wasDerivedFrom ──► PROV-001 (Patient Data)

PROV-008 (AI Rec Reviewed) 
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-004 (AI Recommendation)
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-005 (Lab Results Access)
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-006 (Imaging Report Access)
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-007 (Patient History Access)

PROV-010 (Override Decision) 
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-008 (AI Rec Reviewed)
    └─ wasInformedBy ──► PROV-009 (Clinical Annotation)
    └─ wasGeneratedBy ──► PHYSICIAN_ID:DR-0047

PROV-011 (Final Decision) 
    └─ wasDerivedFrom ──► PROV-010 (Override Decision)
    └─ wasAttributedTo ──► PHYSICIAN_ID:DR-0047
```

## SECTION 3: TEMPORAL VERIFICATION RESULTS

### 3.1 Check (a): Physician Accessed Source Documents BEFORE Approving/Overriding AI Recommendation

**Verification Method:** Timestamp comparison across PROV nodes 005–007 vs. PROV node 010.

| Document Access Event | Timestamp | Override Decision Timestamp | Δ Time Before Override | Status |
|----------------------|-----------|----------------------------|----------------------|--------|
| Lab Results (PROV-005) | 08:51:22Z | 09:04:55Z | **13 min 33 sec BEFORE** | ✓ |
| Imaging Report (PROV-006) | 08:52:08Z | 09:04:55Z | **12 min 47 sec BEFORE** | ✓ |
| Patient History (PROV-007) | 08:53:41Z | 09:04:55Z | **11 min 14 sec BEFORE** | ✓ |

**Critical Sequencing Verification:**
- All three source documents were accessed **AFTER** AI recommendation was generated (08:42:44Z) ✓
- All three source documents were accessed **BEFORE** override decision (09:04:55Z) ✓
- No source document access events detected AFTER the override decision ✓
- PROV graph `wasInformedBy` edges confirm causal dependency of PROV-008 on PROV-005, PROV-006, PROV-007 ✓

```
TEMPORAL SEQUENCE CONFIRMED:
AI_REC_GENERATED (08:42:44Z) 
    → DOC_ACCESS_LAB (08:51:22Z) 
    → DOC_ACCESS_IMG (08:52:08Z) 
    → DOC_ACCESS_HIST (08:53:41Z) 
    → AI_REC_REVIEWED (08:55:03Z) 
    → ANNOTATION (09:02:17Z) 
    → OVERRIDE (09:04:55Z)

ORDER INTEGRITY: VALID ✓
```

### ✅ CHECK (a) RESULT: **PASS**
> Physician demonstrably accessed all three source documents prior to rendering the override decision. Temporal ordering is unambiguous and PROV causal edges confirm informational dependency.

---

### 3.2 Check (b): Total Review Duration Was Meaningful (>5 Seconds Simulated)

**Verification Method:** Calculate elapsed time from first physician interaction (PROV-005) to final decision commitment (PROV-011).

| Phase | Start | End | Duration |
|-------|-------|-----|----------|
| Document Review Phase | 08:51:22Z | 08:55:03Z | 3 min 41 sec |
| AI Recommendation Review | 08:55:03Z | 09:02:17Z | 7 min 14 sec |
| Annotation & Decision Phase | 09:02:17Z | 09:05:12Z | 2 min 55 sec |
| **TOTAL OVERSIGHT DURATION** | **08:51:22Z** | **09:05:12Z** | **13 min 50 sec** |

**Threshold Comparison:**
- Minimum required (simulated): >5 seconds
- Actual duration: **830 seconds (13 min 50 sec)**
- Ratio above threshold: **166× minimum threshold**

**Sub-duration Analysis:**
- Lab results access: 46 seconds (sufficient for basic review)
- Imaging report access: 93 seconds (sufficient for report review)
- Patient history access: 82 seconds (sufficient for history scan)
- AI recommendation review: 434 seconds (7+ minutes — substantive engagement)
- Annotation composition: 138 seconds (2+ minutes — active cognitive work)

**Note on Simulated Environment:** The >5 second threshold is acknowledged as a minimum simulation baseline. In production clinical environments, meaningful review thresholds should be calibrated to case complexity. The observed 13 min 50 sec duration substantially exceeds any reasonable minimum threshold.

### ✅ CHECK (b) RESULT: **PASS**
